next/dist/server/future/route-kind */ \"(rsc)/./node_modules/next/dist/server/future/route-kind.js\");\n/* harmony import */ var next_dist_server_lib_patch_fetch__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_2__ = __webpack_require__(/*! ./src/app/api/chat/route.ts */ \"(rsc)/./src/app/api/chat/route.ts\");\n\n\n\n\n// We inject the nextConfigOutput here so that we can use them in the route\n// module.\nconst nextConfigOutput = \"\"\nconst routeModule = new next_dist_server_future_route_modules_app_route_module_compiled__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.AppRouteRouteModule({\n    definition: {\n        kind: next_dist_server_future_route_kind__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.RouteKind.APP_ROUTE,\n        page: \"/api/chat/route\",\n        pathname: \"/api/chat\",\n        filename: \"route\",\n        bundlePath: \"app/api/chat/route\"\n    },\n    resolvedPagePath: \"C:\\\\Users\\\\HARIKA\\\\fincy\\\\src\\\\app\\\\api\\\\chat\\\\route.ts\",\n    nextConfigOutput,\n    userland: C_Users_HARIKA_fincy_src_app_api_chat_route_ts__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_3__\n});\n// Pull out the exports that we need to expose from the module. .next/server/app/api/chat/route.js:  !*** ./src/app/api/chat/route.ts ***!
.next/server/app/api/chat/route.js:eval("__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);\n/* harmony export */ __webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {\n/* harmony export */   POST: () => (/* binding */ POST)\n/* harmony export */ });\n/* harmony import */ var next_server__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__ = __webpack_require__(/*! next/server */ \"(rsc)/./node_modules/next/dist/api/server.js\");\n/* harmony import */ var _lib_prisma__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__ = __webpack_require__(/*! @/lib/prisma */ \"(rsc)/./src/lib/prisma.ts\");\n/* harmony import */ var _lib_openai__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_2__ = __webpack_require__(/*! @/lib/openai */ \"(rsc)/./src/lib/openai.ts\");\n\n\n\nfunction formatINR(amount) {\n    return `₹${amount.toLocaleString(\"en-IN\")}`;\n}\nfunction createTextStream(message) {\n    const encoder = new TextEncoder();\n    return new ReadableStream({\n        start (controller) {\n            controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(message));\n            controller.close();\n        }\n    });\n}\nfunction generateFallbackResponse(message, session, findings, actions) {\n    const text = message.trim().toLowerCase();\n    const topFinding = findings[0];\n    const topAction = actions[0];\n    if (!session) {\n        return \"No active analysis session is available. Upload or load demo data first so the chat can answer your questions.\";\n    }\n    if (text.includes(\"why\") && text.includes(\"aws\")) {\n        return `AWS is one of your largest risk areas. The top finding shows a high-priority AWS anomaly with a potential saving of ${topAction ? formatINR(topAction.estimatedSavingMonthly) : \"₹0\"} per month.`;\n    }\n    if (text.includes(\"top\") && text.includes(\"action\")) {\n        return topAction ? `The top action is ${topAction.title} with an estimated saving of ${formatINR(topAction.estimatedSavingMonthly)} per month.` : \"No top action is available yet.\";\n    }\n    if (text.includes(\"spend\") || text.includes(\"waste\")) {\n        return `Your current session shows total spend of ${formatINR(session.totalSpend)} and total waste identified of ${formatINR(session.totalWaste)}.`;\n    }\n    if (text.includes(\"vendor\")) {\n        return topFinding ? `The highest risk vendor is ${topFinding.title.split(\" \")[0]} with ${formatINR(topFinding.deltaAmount)} monthly excess.` : \"There are no vendor-specific details available yet.\";\n    }\n    return `I can answer basic spend questions based on the loaded session. For full AI chat, set OPENAI_API_KEY in your environment variables and reload the app.`;\n}\nasync function POST(req) {\n    try {\n        const body = await req.json();\n        const { message, sessionId, history } = body;\n        if (!message || !sessionId) {\n            return next_server__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.NextResponse.json({\n                error: \"message and sessionId are required\"\n            }, {\n                status: 400\n            });\n        }\n        // Fetch session data to build context\n        const session = await _lib_prisma__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.prisma.analysisSession.findUnique({\n            where: {\n                id: sessionId\n            }\n        });\n        if (!session) {\n            return next_server__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.NextResponse.json({\n                error: \"Session not found\"\n            }, {\n                status: 404\n            });\n        }\n        const [findings, actions] = await Promise.all([\n            _lib_prisma__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.prisma.finding.findMany({\n                where: {\n                    sessionId\n                },\n                orderBy: {\n                    projectedAnnualWaste: \"desc\"\n                },\n                take: 10\n            }),\n            _lib_prisma__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.prisma.actionLog.findMany({\n                where: {\n                    finding: {\n                        sessionId\n                    }\n                },\n                orderBy: {\n                    priority: \"asc\"\n                },\n                take: 5,\n                include: {\n                    finding: true\n                }\n            })\n        ]);\n        const topFinding = findings[0];\n        const uniqueDepts = Array.from(new Set(findings.map((f)=>f.affectedDepartment).filter(Boolean)));\n        const topVendors = Array.from(new Set(findings.map((f)=>f.affectedVendor).filter(Boolean))).slice(0, 5);\n        const totalSpend = session.totalSpend;\n        const totalWaste = session.totalWaste;\n        const overspendPct = session.overspendPct;\n        const findingsCount = findings.length;\n        const findingsDetail = findings.map((f)=>`- ${f.title}: ₹${f.deltaAmount.toLocaleString(\"en-IN\")}/mo waste, ${f.severity} severity, affects ${f.affectedDepartment ?? \"Unknown\"}`).join(\"\\n\");\n        const topActionsText = actions.map((a)=>a.title).join(\", \");\n        const systemPrompt = `You are Finci, an expert AI CFO assistant built into a cost intelligence platform. You have full access to the current expense analysis session.\r\n\r\nSESSION DATA:\r\n- Total spend: ₹${totalSpend.toLocaleString(\"en-IN\")}\r\n- Total waste identified: ₹${totalWaste.toLocaleString(\"en-IN\")}\r\n- Overspend percentage: ${overspendPct.toFixed(1)}%\r\n- Number of anomalies found: ${findingsCount}\r\n- Top finding: ${topFinding ? `${topFinding.title} — ₹${topFinding.deltaAmount.toLocaleString(\"en-IN\")}/month waste` : \"None yet\"}\r\n- Top 3 recommended actions: ${topActionsText}\r\n- Affected departments: ${uniqueDepts.join(\", \")}\r\n- Affected vendors: ${topVendors.join(\", \")}\r\n\r\nFINDINGS DETAIL:\r\n${findingsDetail}\r\n\r\nAnswer questions concisely. Use ₹ Indian formatting. Be direct.\r\nIf asked about a specific vendor/department, give specific numbers.\r\nKeep answers under 3 sentences unless a detailed breakdown is asked for.\r\nNever say \"I don't have access to\" — you have all the data above.`;\n        // Limit history to last 10 messages\n        const recentHistory = history.slice(-10);\n        const messages = [\n            {\n                role: \"system\",\n                content: systemPrompt\n            },\n            ...recentHistory,\n            {\n                role: \"user\",\n                content: message\n            }\n        ];\n        if (!_lib_openai__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_2__.openai) {\n            const fallbackText = generateFallbackResponse(message, session, findings, actions);\n            return new Response(createTextStream(fallbackText), {\n                headers: {\n                    \"Content-Type\": \"text/plain; charset=utf-8\",\n                    \"Cache-Control\": \"no-cache\"\n                }\n            });\n        }\n        // Streaming response\n        const encoder = new TextEncoder();\n        const openaiClient = _lib_openai__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_2__.openai;\n        const stream = new ReadableStream({\n            async start (controller) {\n                try {\n                    const completion = await openaiClient.chat.completions.create({\n                        model: _lib_openai__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_2__.OPENAI_MODEL,\n                        messages,\n                        stream: true,\n                        max_tokens: 500\n                    });\n                    for await (const chunk of completion){\n                        const delta = chunk.choices[0]?.delta?.content;\n                        if (delta) {\n                            controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(delta));\n                        }\n                    }\n                } catch (err) {\n                    controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`\\n\\n[Error: ${err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Unknown error\"}]`));\n                } finally{\n                    controller.close();\n                }\n            }\n        });\n        return new Response(stream, {\n            headers: {\n                \"Content-Type\": \"text/plain; charset=utf-8\",\n                \"Transfer-Encoding\": \"chunked\",\n                \"Cache-Control\": \"no-cache\"\n            }\n        });\n    } catch  {\n        return next_server__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.NextResponse.json({\n            error: \"Internal server error\"\n        }, {\n            status: 500\n        });\n    }\n}\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(rsc)/./src/app/api/chat/route.ts\n");
.next/server/app/dashboard/page.js:eval("__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);\n/* harmony export */ __webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {\n/* harmony export */   \"default\": () => (/* /*#__PURE__*/__webpack_require__.n(react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__);\n/* harmony import */ var react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__ = __webpack_require__(/*! react */ \"(ssr)/./node_modules/next/dist/server/future/route-modules/app-page/vendored/ssr/react.js\");\n/* harmony import */ var react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1___default = /*#__PURE__*/__webpack_require__.n(react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__);\n/* __next_internal_client_entry_do_not_use__ default auto */ \n\nconst SUGGESTED_QUESTIONS = [\n    \"Why did AWS costs spike?\",\n    \"Which dept wastes most?\",\n    \"What saves the most money?\",\n    \"Show me duplicate charges\"\n];\nfunction FinciChat({ sessionId, pendingCount = 0 }) {\n    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(false);\n    const [messages, setMessages] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)([]);\n    const [input, setInput] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(\"\");\n    const [loading, setLoading] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(false);\n    const [localSessionId, setLocalSessionId] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(null);\n    const messagesEndRef = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useRef)(null);\n    const inputRef = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useRef)(null);\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)(()=>{\n        if (isOpen && inputRef.current) {\n            inputRef.current.focus();\n        }\n    }, [\n        isOpen\n    ]);\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)(()=>{\n        if (!sessionId) {\n            const stored = window.localStorage.getItem(\"finci_session_id\");\n            if (stored) setLocalSessionId(stored);\n        }\n    }, [\n        sessionId\n    ]);\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)(()=>{\n        if (messagesEndRef.current) {\n            messagesEndRef.current.scrollIntoView({\n                behavior: \"smooth\"\n            });\n        }\n    }, [\n        messages\n    ]);\n    async function sendMessage(text) {\n        if (!text.trim() || loading) return;\n        const userMsg = {\n            role: \"user\",\n            content: text\n        };\n        const assistantPlaceholder = {\n            role: \"assistant\",\n            content: \"\"\n        };\n        const activeSessionId = sessionId ?? localSessionId ?? \"demo\";\n        const historyPayload = [\n            ...messages.slice(-9),\n            userMsg\n        ];\n        setMessages((prev)=>[\n                ...prev,\n                userMsg,\n                assistantPlaceholder\n            ]);\n        setInput(\"\");\n        setLoading(true);\n        try {\n            const res = await fetch(\"/api/chat\", {\n                method: \"POST\",\n                headers: {\n                    \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\"\n                },\n                body: JSON.stringify({\n                    message: text,\n                    sessionId: activeSessionId,\n                    history: historyPayload\n                })\n            });\n            if (!res.ok || !res.body) {\n                setMessages((prev)=>{\n                    const copy = [\n                        ...prev\n                    ];\n                    copy[copy.length - 1] = {\n                        role: \"assistant\",\n                        content: \"Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.\"\n                    };\n                    return copy;\n                });\n                return;\n            }\n            const reader = res.body.getReader();\n            const decoder = new TextDecoder();\n            let accumulated = \"\";\n            while(true){\n                const { done, value } = await reader.read();\n                if (done) break;\n                accumulated += decoder.decode(value, {\n                    stream: true\n                });\n                const snapshot = accumulated;\n                setMessages((prev)=>{\n                    const copy = [\n                        ...prev\n                    ];\n                    copy[copy.length - 1] = {\n                        role: \"assistant\",\n                        content: snapshot\n                    };\n                    return copy;\n                });\n            }\n        } catch  {\n            setMessages((prev)=>{\n                const copy = [\n                    ...prev\n                ];\n                copy[copy.length - 1] = {\n                    role: \"assistant\",\n                    content: \"Something went wrong. Please try again.\"\n                };\n                return copy;\n            });\n        } finally{\n            setLoading(false);\n        }\n    }\n    return /*#__PURE__*/ (0,react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.jsxDEV)(react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.Fragment, {\n        children: [\n            /*#__PURE__*/ .next/server/app/page.js:eval("__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);\n/* harmony export */ __webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {\n/* harmony export */   \"default\": () => (/* binding */ FinciChat)\n/* harmony export */ });\n/* harmony import */ var react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__ = __webpack_require__(/*! react/jsx-dev-runtime */ \"(ssr)/./node_modules/next/dist/server/future/route-modules/app-page/vendored/ssr/react-jsx-dev-runtime.js\");\n/* harmony import */ var react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0___default = /*#__PURE__*/__webpack_require__.n(react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__);\n/* harmony import */ var react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__ = __webpack_require__(/*! react */ \"(ssr)/./node_modules/next/dist/server/future/route-modules/app-page/vendored/ssr/react.js\");\n/* harmony import */ var react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1___default = /*#__PURE__*/__webpack_require__.n(react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__);\n/* __next_internal_client_entry_do_not_use__ default auto */ \n\nconst SUGGESTED_QUESTIONS = [\n    \"Why did AWS costs spike?\",\n    \"Which dept wastes most?\",\n    \"What saves the most money?\",\n    \"Show me duplicate charges\"\n];\nfunction FinciChat({ sessionId, pendingCount = 0 }) {\n    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(false);\n    const [messages, setMessages] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)([]);\n    const [input, setInput] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(\"\");\n    const [loading, setLoading] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(false);\n    const [localSessionId, setLocalSessionId] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(null);\n    const messagesEndRef = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useRef)(null);\n    const inputRef = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useRef)(null);\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)(()=>{\n        if (isOpen && inputRef.current) {\n            inputRef.current.focus();\n        }\n    }, [\n        isOpen\n    ]);\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)(()=>{\n        if (!sessionId) {\n            const stored = window.localStorage.getItem(\"finci_session_id\");\n            if (stored) setLocalSessionId(stored);\n        }\n    }, [\n        sessionId\n    ]);\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)(()=>{\n        if (messagesEndRef.current) {\n            messagesEndRef.current.scrollIntoView({\n                behavior: \"smooth\"\n            });\n        }\n    }, [\n        messages\n    ]);\n    async function sendMessage(text) {\n        if (!text.trim() || loading) return;\n        const userMsg = {\n            role: \"user\",\n            content: text\n        };\n        const assistantPlaceholder = {\n            role: \"assistant\",\n            content: \"\"\n        };\n        const activeSessionId = sessionId ?? localSessionId ?? \"demo\";\n        const historyPayload = [\n            ...messages.slice(-9),\n            userMsg\n        ];\n        setMessages((prev)=>[\n                ...prev,\n                userMsg,\n                assistantPlaceholder\n            ]);\n        setInput(\"\");\n        setLoading(true);\n        try {\n            const res = await fetch(\"/api/chat\", {\n                method: \"POST\",\n                headers: {\n                    \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\"\n                },\n                body: JSON.stringify({\n                    message: text,\n                    sessionId: activeSessionId,\n                    history: historyPayload\n                })\n            });\n            if (!res.ok || !res.body) {\n                setMessages((prev)=>{\n                    const copy = [\n                        ...prev\n                    ];\n                    copy[copy.length - 1] = {\n                        role: \"assistant\",\n                        content: \"Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.\"\n                    };\n                    return copy;\n                });\n                return;\n            }\n            const reader = res.body.getReader();\n            const decoder = new TextDecoder();\n            let accumulated = \"\";\n            while(true){\n                const { done, value } = await reader.read();\n                if (done) break;\n                accumulated += decoder.decode(value, {\n                    stream: true\n                });\n                const snapshot = accumulated;\n                setMessages((prev)=>{\n                    const copy = [\n                        ...prev\n                    ];\n                    copy[copy.length - 1] = {\n                        role: \"assistant\",\n                        content: snapshot\n                    };\n                    return copy;\n                });\n            }\n        } catch  {\n            setMessages((prev)=>{\n                const copy = [\n                    ...prev\n                ];\n                copy[copy.length - 1] = {\n                    role: \"assistant\",\n                    content: \"Something went wrong. Please try again.\"\n                };\n                return copy;\n            });\n        } finally{\n            setLoading(false);\n        }\n    }\n    return /*#__PURE__*/ (0,react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.jsxDEV)(react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.Fragment, {\n        children: [\n            /*#__PURE__*/ .next/static/chunks/app/layout.js:eval(__webpack_require__.ts("__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);\n/* harmony export */ __webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {\n/* harmony export */ react */ \"(app-pages-browser)/./node_modules/next/dist/compiled/react/index.js\");\n/* harmony import */ var react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1___default = /*#__PURE__*/__webpack_require__.n(react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__);\n/* __next_internal_client_entry_do_not_use__ default auto */ \nvar _s = $RefreshSig$();\n\nconst SUGGESTED_QUESTIONS = [\n    \"Why did AWS costs spike?\",\n    \"Which dept wastes most?\",\n    \"What saves the most money?\",\n    \"Show me duplicate charges\"\n];\nfunction FinciChat(param) {\n    let { sessionId, pendingCount = 0 } = param;\n    _s();\n    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(false);\n    const [messages, setMessages] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)([]);\n    const [input, setInput] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(\"\");\n    const [loading, setLoading] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(false);\n    const [localSessionId, setLocalSessionId] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(null);\n    const messagesEndRef = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useRef)(null);\n    const inputRef = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useRef)(null);\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)(()=>{\n        if (isOpen && inputRef.current) {\n            inputRef.current.focus();\n        }\n    }, [\n        isOpen\n    ]);\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)(()=>{\n        if (!sessionId) {\n            const stored = window.localStorage.getItem(\"finci_session_id\");\n            if (stored) setLocalSessionId(stored);\n        }\n    }, [\n        sessionId\n    ]);\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)(()=>{\n        if (messagesEndRef.current) {\n            messagesEndRef.current.scrollIntoView({\n                behavior: \"smooth\"\n            });\n        }\n    }, [\n        messages\n    ]);\n    async function sendMessage(text) {\n        if (!text.trim() || loading) return;\n        const userMsg = {\n            role: \"user\",\n            content: text\n        };\n        const assistantPlaceholder = {\n            role: \"assistant\",\n            content: \"\"\n        };\n        var _ref;\n        const activeSessionId = (_ref = sessionId !== null && sessionId !== void 0 ? sessionId : localSessionId) !== null && _ref !== void 0 ? _ref : \"demo\";\n        const historyPayload = [\n            ...messages.slice(-9),\n            userMsg\n        ];\n        setMessages((prev)=>[\n                ...prev,\n                userMsg,\n                assistantPlaceholder\n            ]);\n        setInput(\"\");\n        setLoading(true);\n        try {\n            const res = await fetch(\"/api/chat\", {\n                method: \"POST\",\n                headers: {\n                    \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\"\n                },\n                body: JSON.stringify({\n                    message: text,\n                    sessionId: activeSessionId,\n                    history: historyPayload\n                })\n            });\n            if (!res.ok || !res.body) {\n                setMessages((prev)=>{\n                    const copy = [\n                        ...prev\n                    ];\n                    copy[copy.length - 1] = {\n                        role: \"assistant\",\n                        content: \"Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.\"\n                    };\n                    return copy;\n                });\n                return;\n            }\n            const reader = res.body.getReader();\n            const decoder = new TextDecoder();\n            let accumulated = \"\";\n            while(true){\n                const { done, value } = await reader.read();\n                if (done) break;\n                accumulated += decoder.decode(value, {\n                    stream: true\n                });\n                const snapshot = accumulated;\n                setMessages((prev)=>{\n                    const copy = [\n                        ...prev\n                    ];\n                    copy[copy.length - 1] = {\n                        role: \"assistant\",\n                        content: snapshot\n                    };\n                    return copy;\n                });\n            }\n        } catch (e) {\n            setMessages((prev)=>{\n                const copy = [\n                    ...prev\n                ];\n                copy[copy.length - 1] = {\n                    role: \"assistant\",\n                    content: \"Something went wrong. Please try again.\"\n                };\n                return copy;\n            });\n        } finally{\n            setLoading(false);\n        }\n    }\n    return /*#__PURE__*/ We avoid saving exports themselves since it causes memory leaks (https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/53797)\n                module.hot.dispose(function (data) {\n                    data.prevSignature =\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports);\n                });\n                // Unconditionally accept an update to this module, we'll check if it's\n                // still a Refresh Boundary later.\n                // @ts-ignore importMeta is replaced in the loader\n                module.hot.accept();\n                // This field is set when the previous version of this module was a\n                // Refresh Boundary, letting us know we need to check for invalidation or\n                // enqueue an update.\n                if (prevSignature !== null) {\n                    // A boundary can become ineligible if its exports are incompatible\n                    // with the previous exports.\n                    //\n                    // For example, if you add/remove/change exports, we'll want to\n                    // re-execute the importing modules, and force those components to\n                    // re-render. Similarly, if you convert a class component to a\n                    // function, we want to invalidate the boundary.\n                    if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.shouldInvalidateReactRefreshBoundary(prevSignature, self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports))) {\n                        module.hot.invalidate();\n                    }\n                    else {\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.scheduleUpdate();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            else {\n                // Since we just executed the code for the module, it's possible that the\n                // new exports made it ineligible for being a boundary.\n                // We only care about the case when we were _previously_ a boundary,\n                // because we already accepted this update (accidental side effect).\n                var isNoLongerABoundary = prevSignature !== null;\n                if (isNoLongerABoundary) {\n                    module.hot.invalidate();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    })();\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(app-pages-browser)/./src/components/FinciChat.tsx\n"));
